name: Goku vs Venom: Null Void Showdown

effects.name: Disoriented
effects.description: Thrown off balance by a sudden gravity flicker.

effects.name: Kamehameha Blast
effects.description: Struck head-on by a concentrated beam of ki.

effects.name: Bite Wound
effects.description: Punctured by the symbiote's fanged maw.

items.name: Senzu Bean
items.description: A single bean that undoes exhaustion and closes wounds almost instantly.

items.name: Salvaged Plating
items.description: Hull plating torn from the wreckage field and bound to the body with symbiote mass.
